responsibilities: • manage global budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning   • consolidate financial statements of global enti ties  • analyze financial performance across regions   • ensure compliance with international accounting and tax laws   • oversee treasury, cash flow, and global funding structures   • lead and mentor international finance teams   • support strategic decisions, expansion, an d investments
qualifications: • ca with 8 –15 years of global finance experience   • expertise in consolidation and international compliance   • strong leadership and stakeholder management skills
